vllm.title: [hardware] unify usage of is_tpu to current_platform.is_tpu()
vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: [TPU] Suppress import custom_ops warning
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR suppresses the unnecessary warning when running vLLM on TPUs:
WARNING 08-13 04:48:22 _custom_ops.py:15] Failed to import from vllm._C with ModuleNotFoundError("No module named 'vllm._C'")

vllm.title: Revert "[Doc] Update supported_hardware.rst (#7276)"
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The documentation build started to fail after #7276 was merged. Let's revert the PR and fix the bug.

vllm.title: [Frontend][Core] Add plumbing to support audio language models
vllm.author: petersalas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This adds infrastructure to support multi-modal audio language models.

MultiModalDataBuiltins defines audio as a tuple of a numpy.ndarray and the sample rate. (librosa is used to parse the audio.)
DEFAULT_PLUGINS now includes an AudioPlugin
The OpenAI API frontend tentatively supports "audio_url" c

vllm.title: [Misc] Update LM Eval Tolerance
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

The current tolerance for LM Eval Tests is 0.02 but tests are currently failing with errors ranging from 0.025-0.03. This PR updates the tolerance to 0.05

vllm.title: [Misc] Update `gptq_marlin` to use new vLLMParameters
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Updates the gptq_marlin parameters to use vLLMParameters to simplify linear layer weight loading
Updates to add PackedColumnParameter to support packed parameters without row parallelism

vllm.title: [Misc] Update Fused MoE weight loading
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:

Splits up #6422 into two separate PRs. This is the first of the two. The second will leverage the weight loading changes introduced in this PR while adding the AWQ Fused MoE Kernel
Refactors FusedMoE.weight_loader, to enable loading AWQ models, which have transposed weights (input_dim, out

vllm.title: [Misc] Update `awq` and `awq_marlin` to use `vLLMParameters`
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Update the awq and awq_marlin quant methods to use vLLMParameters for weight loading

vllm.title: [frontend] spawn engine process from api server process
vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: [Misc] `compressed-tensors` code reuse
vllm.author: kylesayrs
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reuse existing implementations of compression and quantization configs defined by compressed-tensors
Adds compressed-tensors as a dependency to vllm

The reused classes are

CompressionFormat
QuantizationArgs
QuantizationStrategy
QuantizationType

vllm.title: [TPU] Support multi-host inference
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Changing global rank and world size into local rank and local world size.

vllm.title: [CI/Build]Reduce the time consumption for LoRA tests
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The current CI LoRA tests is quite time-consuming, which hampers the development of LoRA-related features. Based on testing on my local single 3090, the three most time-consuming tests are:



case
time




test_punica_variation.py
33minutes


test_layer_variation.py
23minutes


test_punica_sizes.py
